data.name: PageTitle
data.comment: Browser tab title

data.name: MetaDescription
data.value: Panel principal de Control Peso Thiscloud. Visualiza tus métricas de peso actual, cambio semanal, progreso hacia tu meta e IMC con gráficos de evolución.
data.comment: SEO meta description

data.name: MetaKeywords
data.value: dashboard, panel de control, métricas peso, gráfico evolución, IMC, seguimiento peso
data.comment: SEO keywords

data.name: OgTitle
data.comment: Open Graph title for social media

data.name: OgDescription
data.value: Panel principal de Control Peso Thiscloud con métricas en tiempo real y gráficos de evolución.
data.comment: Open Graph description for social media

data.name: WelcomeTitle
data.comment: Empty state welcome message title

data.name: WelcomeSubtitle
data.value: Comienza tu seguimiento de peso hoy
data.comment: Empty state subtitle

data.name: WelcomeDescription
data.value: Agrega tu primer registro de peso para comenzar a ver tus estadísticas, gráficos de evolución y seguir tu progreso hacia tu meta de salud.
data.comment: Empty state description

data.name: AddFirstWeightButton
data.comment: Button text for adding first weight entry

data.name: WelcomeBack
data.comment: Welcome message with user name. Placeholder {0} = user name

data.name: ProgressSubtitle
data.value: Aquí está tu progreso de los últimos 30 días.
data.comment: Subtitle showing progress period

data.name: ExportButton
data.comment: Export data button

data.name: CurrentWeightLabel
data.comment: Stats card label for current weight

data.name: LastMeasured
data.comment: Last measurement time. Placeholder {0} = time ago (e.g., "hace 2 horas")

data.name: WeeklyChangeLabel
data.comment: Stats card label for weekly weight change

data.name: OnTrack
data.comment: Status message when weight change is positive (losing weight)

data.name: AboveTarget
data.comment: Status message when weight change is negative (gaining weight)

data.name: GoalProgressLabel
data.comment: Stats card label for goal progress

data.name: ToTarget
data.comment: Remaining weight to goal. Placeholder {0} = lbs remaining

data.name: WeightEvolutionTitle
data.comment: Chart section title

data.name: WeightEvolutionSubtitle
data.value: Tendencia de rendimiento en los últimos 30 días
data.comment: Chart section subtitle

data.name: Period1W
data.comment: Period filter button: 1 semana

data.name: Period1M
data.comment: Period filter button: 1 mes

data.name: Period3M
data.comment: Period filter button: 3 meses

data.name: PeriodAll
data.comment: Period filter button: all time

data.name: MeasurementLogTitle
data.comment: Table section title

data.name: SearchPlaceholder
data.comment: Search input placeholder

data.name: TableHeaderDateTime
data.comment: Table column header for date and time

data.name: TableHeaderWeight
data.comment: Table column header for weight

data.name: TableHeaderTrend
data.comment: Table column header for trend

data.name: TableHeaderNotes
data.comment: Table column header for notes

data.name: TableHeaderActions
data.comment: Table column header for action buttons

data.name: PagerShowing
data.comment: Pagination text. {0} = first entry number, {1} = last entry number, {2} = total entries

data.name: FabAriaLabel
data.comment: Aria label for floating action button

data.name: MoreActionsAriaLabel
data.comment: Aria label for more actions button in table

data.name: ErrorLoadingDashboard
data.value: Error al cargar el dashboard. Por favor, intenta nuevamente.
data.comment: Error message when dashboard fails to load

data.name: ErrorLoadingData
data.comment: Error message when data loading fails. {0} = error details

data.name: ErrorExportingData
data.value: Error al exportar los datos. Por favor, intenta nuevamente.
data.comment: Error message when CSV export fails

data.name: NoDataToExport
data.value: No hay datos para exportar. Agrega algunos registros de peso primero.
data.comment: Warning message when trying to export with no data

data.name: ExportSuccess
data.comment: Success message after CSV export. {0} = number of records exported

data.name: TimeAgoMinutes
data.comment: Relative time text for last measured (less than 1 hour ago)

data.name: TimeAgoHours
data.comment: Relative time text for last measured (hours ago). {0} = hours count

data.name: TimeAgoDays
data.comment: Relative time text for last measured (days ago). {0} = days count

data.name: ExportComingSoon
data.comment: Info message when export button is clicked

data.name: AddWeightDialogTitle
data.comment: Title for add weight dialog

data.name: WeightSavedSuccess
data.comment: Success message after weight is saved
